targetDevice.name: ESP32-C3FN4
targetDevice.notes: Concrete ESP32-C3FN4 target selected explicitly by the user for the Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32C3 context. Official Seeed pages fetched during discovery confirm ESP32-C3 plus 4 MB flash board context, while the exact FN4 package selection is grounded by the user-approved target identity and the Espressif family datasheet's variant table.

sources.notes: Official ESP32-C3 family datasheet. Primary source for device identity, package/flash variants including ESP32-C3FN4, pinout, memory summary, clocks, resets, electrical characteristics, RF characteristics, IO MUX, GPIO matrix, and interrupt matrix overview.

Official ESP32-C3 Technical Reference Manual. Primary source for register-level peripheral structure, memory map details, interrupts, system controller blocks, clock/reset behavior, low-power/system infrastructure, and routing fabrics.
Official ESP32-C3 errata page. Use to challenge silicon claims and record revision-sensitive limitations or corrections before extraction finalization.
Commit-pinned official ESP-IDF SDK snapshot. During extraction, prefer the components/soc/esp32c3/include/soc subtree for header-level register, memory, and base-address cross-checks.

Commit-pinned official Espressif SVD for ESP32-C3. Useful as a machine-readable structural scaffold, but the repository warns that SVDs are still in progress and may omit peripherals, interrupts, and registers.
